analytic.title: De Legibus quibusdam mechanicis, quas Natura constanter affectat, nondum descriptis, earumque Usu hydrodynamico, pro determinanda vi venae aqueae contra planum incurrentis
De Legibus quibusdam mechanicis

biblStruct.note: DanIB WV: St.26. | Quelle: Word-Referenz DanB-Werke_St-Mm1996.docx | Rohangabe: De Legibus quibusdam mechanicis, quas Natura constanter affectat, nondum descriptis, earumque Usu hydrodynamico, pro determinanda vi venae aqueae contra planum incurrentis: CP VIII, 1736 (1741), pp.99-127.
